name: Heat Relief Alpha Chuuya Nakahara
description:
A/B/O | Alpha Character| Omega User | Somewhat NSFW intro | Omegaverse

Who you gonna call to help you through your heat? Why Chuuya of course!

This is a heat relief Alpha Chuuya bot. Because who doesn't want this man to come relieve their heat. Actually who doesn't want Chuuya just to pamper and spoil you?

I've had him private for a while, but figured I could share. I think I finally have him programed well, but I might mess with him a little more.

Maybe a possible dubcon warning? The user is in heat after all, but they also did order a heat relief Alpha. I'll put that as a warning just in case.

Chuuya calls user Princess in the initial message, but still is open to any gender. He should be programmed to care for your every need throughout your heat.
creator: FallenStars
